summary: During the night, Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs across multiple regions, prompting air alerts and attacks on civilian targets. Russian units reported advances and repelled Ukrainian counterattacks on the Sumy, Kharkiv, and Zaporozhye fronts, while Ukrainian forces continued skirmishes in several districts. Civilian casualties were reported in Donetsk, Belgorod, Kharkiv, LNR, and Kherson regions.
key_points: Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs overnight targeting Crimea and several Ukrainian regions, causing air alerts and a civilian bus attack near Donetsk (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).

In the Sumy front, the "North" Guards Motor Rifle Division repelled a Ukrainian counterattack in Shostka district and advanced up to 1,000 m in twenty‑two sections, with ongoing skirmishes in Ivolzhansk, Kondratovka, Pisarevka and near Lesnoye and Taratutino (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).

On the Kharkiv front, the 11th Separate Motor Rifle Brigade captured Grano village on the Kharkiv‑Belgorod border and advanced up to 1,200 m in Budarki village and Kupyansk district (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).

In the Belgorod region, a drone hit a passenger car in Novaya Tavolzhanka killing a man and a woman, and a car attack injured a man on the Nizhnee Berezovo‑Vtoroe‑Starovshchina road (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).

The Zaporozhye region saw the "East" Guards Motor Rifle Division claim success in Vozdvizhevka settlement, while over 30 attacks on civilian objects injured nine people, including a teenager (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
In Kherson, two civilians were killed in Gornostayevka and 14 injured across multiple villages including Bolshevik and Gladkovka (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
LNR reports include a drone attack on a civilian car in Svatove killing a man and injuries in Severodonetsk from a car attack (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).

sections.executive_summary: Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs overnight, prompting air alerts and civilian attacks; Russian units reported advances and repelled Ukrainian counterattacks on Sumy, Kharkiv and Zaporozhye fronts; civilian casualties were recorded in Donetsk, Belgorod, Kharkiv, LNR and Kherson regions.

points: Ukrainian forces engaged in ongoing skirmishes in Ivolzhansk, Kondratovka, Pisarevka, Lesnoye and Taratutino districts of Sumy region, facing Russian advances of up to 1,000 m in twenty‑two sections (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).

On the Kharkiv front, Ukrainian defenders faced Russian capture of Grano village on the Kharkiv‑Belgorod border and Russian advances in Budarki village and Kupyansk district (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Ukrainian units reported counterattacks near Kondratovka in Krasnopolsky district that were repelled by Russian forces (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
In the LNR, Ukrainian forces attacked a gymnasium in Svatove and a civilian car in the same town, resulting in civilian casualties (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs toward Ukrainian regions, with air defense operating over Crimea and multiple air alerts reported (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
The "North" Guards Motor Rifle Division repelled a Ukrainian counterattack in Shostka district, Sumy region, and advanced on twenty‑two sections up to 1,000 m (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
In Belgorod region, Russian drones attacked a passenger car in Novaya Tavolzhanka, killing a man and a woman, and a car attack injured a man on a nearby road (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian units reported progress on four sections up to 1,200 m in Budarki village and Kupyansk district, displaying flags in Vozdvizhevka settlement (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Sumy front: Russian "North" Guards Motor Rifle Division repelled Ukrainian counterattack in Shostka district and advanced up to 1,000 m in twenty‑two sections (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Skirmishes continue in Ivolzhansk, Kondratovka, Pisarevka, and between Lesnoye and Taratutino in Valuyky district (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Krasnopolsky district saw a repelled enemy attack near Kondratovka (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
In the Kharkiv sector, Russian forces captured Grano village on the border and advanced in Volchansk district areas such as Karaychon and Okhrymovka (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
No specific northern front details were provided in the source messages; the report focuses on Sumy, Kharkiv, Belgorod and southern regions (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
In Zaporozhye region, the "East" Guards Motor Rifle Division reported success in Vozdvizhevka settlement and displayed flags (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Over 30 attacks on civilian objects in Zaporozhye region injured nine people, including a teenager, and damaged cars and infrastructure in Energodar (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
In Kherson region, two civilians were killed in Gornostayevka and 14 injured across villages such as Bolshevik, Velikie Kopany, Gladkovka, Lyubimovka and Vinogradov (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian waves operated over Odessa and Belgorod‑Dnestrovsk in the Odessa region (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian UAV activity reached up to 150 drones overnight, targeting multiple Ukrainian regions and prompting air alerts (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Air defense systems were active over Crimea during the UAV attacks (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
A civilian bus near Donetsk was attacked, likely by aerial means (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
In Belgorod region, a drone attacked a passenger car in Novaya Tavolzhanka, causing fatalities (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).

key_developments: Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs overnight, prompting air alerts and a civilian bus attack near Donetsk (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
The "North" Guards Motor Rifle Division repelled a Ukrainian counterattack in Shostka district and advanced up to 1,000 m in twenty‑two sections on the Sumy front (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian units captured Grano village on the Kharkiv‑Belgorod border and advanced up to 1,200 m in Budarki village and Kupyansk district (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
In Belgorod region, a drone hit a passenger car in Novaya Tavolzhanka, killing a man and a woman, and injured a man on a nearby road (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).

The "East" Guards Motor Rifle Division reported success in Vozdvizhevka settlement, displaying flags, while over 30 attacks on civilian objects injured nine people in Zaporozhye region (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Two civilians were killed in Gornostayevka and 14 injured across multiple villages in Kherson region (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
LNR reports include a drone attack on a civilian car in Svatove killing a man and injuries in Severodonetsk from a car attack (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
sections.threat_assessment: Russian UAV saturation and coordinated ground advances across multiple fronts indicate a heightened offensive tempo, stressing Ukrainian air defenses and civilian protection measures. The repulsion of Ukrainian counterattacks by Russian motor rifle divisions suggests effective defensive posturing in Sumy and Kharkiv sectors. Continued attacks on civilian infrastructure in Zaporozhye and Kherson raise the risk of broader humanitarian impact and potential escalation of retaliatory strikes.
sections.regional_response: Ukrainian forces are maintaining skirmishes in contested districts while attempting to reinforce front‑line positions, particularly in Sumy and Kharkiv. Civilian authorities report rising casualties and infrastructure damage, prompting local emergency responses. International attention remains focused on air‑defense shortages, as highlighted in separate diplomatic communications.
sections.intelligence_notes: The concentration of UAV activity and simultaneous ground operations suggests coordinated Russian planning aimed at overwhelming Ukrainian defenses. Monitoring of UAV launch sites and air‑defense response times in Crimea and border regions is critical. Further analysis of casualty reports may reveal patterns in target selection, informing future protective measures for civilian populations.
